title: Genuine ambiguity — agent unsure, escalates
customer_email: I ordered ord_3003 as a gift back in May. The recipient says it never worked but I only found out recently. I'm not sure if I'm eligible but I'd like to try. — Priya

envelope.agent_summary: Far outside the window, no clear defect report on file, gift scenario complicates timing. Genuine ambiguity — recommend escalating to a human.

policy_clauses_cited.quote: Cases with insufficient evidence should be escalated.

claims.statement: Order was placed well outside the refund window
